# Summary
<!-- What and why -->

# Jira
- Issue: CTB-<num> — <title>
- Acceptance Criteria:
  - [ ] AC1: ...
  - [ ] AC2: ...

# Tests
- [ ] Failing test added first (link to file/lines)
- [ ] Unit tests passing
- [ ] E2E (if applicable) passing

# Evidence
- [ ] Screenshots / run logs
- [ ] Metrics deltas (latency, $/encounter, support score)

# Risk & Rollback
- Risk: <low/med/high>
- Rollback plan: <how disable/flag>

# Checklist
- [ ] No PHI in code/logs
- [ ] Secrets via env/CI; none in repo
- [ ] Docs/CHANGELOG updated
